topic: A garden gnome I never bought moves around my yard, always facing the house.
title: The Garden Gnome I Never Bought | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A garden gnome I never bought stood in my yard, always facing the house.
scenes.image_prompt: A small weathered garden gnome on a lawn turned toward a dim house, early fog, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had lived alone in this house for nine years.
scenes.image_prompt: A quiet suburban backyard with a wooden fence at dusk, low light, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning I drank my coffee by the back window.
scenes.image_prompt: A coffee mug on a windowsill overlooking a misty backyard at dawn, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On Monday the gnome stood by the shed. On Tuesday, the flowerbed.
scenes.image_prompt: A garden gnome standing beside a weathered shed in morning fog, gray light, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I threw it in the trash.
scenes.image_prompt: A garden gnome lying inside an open outdoor trash bin, dim light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next dawn it stood at my back door, still facing in.
scenes.image_prompt: A garden gnome positioned directly before a closed back door, turned inward, soft fog, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I locked it in the garage that night.
scenes.image_prompt: A closed garage door at night under a faint security light, deep shadow, haze, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning it had returned to the lawn, closer to the window.
scenes.image_prompt: A garden gnome on a lawn closer to a house window at dawn, dewy grass, gray fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every day it crept a few feet nearer the glass.
scenes.image_prompt: A garden gnome partway across a lawn approaching a back window, twilight, long shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night it pressed against the window, looking straight at my chair.
scenes.image_prompt: A garden gnome pressed against the outside of a dark window facing in, night, streetlight glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I packed and drove four hundred miles away.
scenes.image_prompt: A car loaded with boxes on a long empty highway at dusk, low light, haze, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: It sat on the new porch when I arrived, already turned toward the door.
scenes.image_prompt: A garden gnome on an unfamiliar porch turned toward a front door, twilight, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
